lines.text: Oh, a call from the honored Laureate {Male=himself;Female=herself}. What is it? Missing the serenity of my castle, I presume?
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Cartethyia is missing… I see.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: It is indeed a rather urgent issue.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Go on, what is it you wish to ask of me?
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Ah, caution is indeed a virtue. Since you're in a hurry, I'll spare you the lengthy details.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: That archipelago is called Septimont.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: It's another city-state within Rinascita. Like us Ragunnesi, its people were guided by the Sentinel across vast seas to settle there.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: But over time, Septimont and Ragunna's differences led to a rift. Each one forged its own path.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Septimontians don't believe in the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Even from a shared origin, the hearts and minds of people can diverge in unexpected ways.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Septimont is a city of warriors. Its creed is simple "All for glory, fear no death." They revere heroes, not the Divinity.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Under The Order's control, Ragunna enforces strict border controls for Septimontians, but Septimont places no such barriers for the Ragunnesi.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: You could say that Septimont has a far more accepting attitude toward outlanders.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: At present, Septimont is hosting the Great Agon, a cornerstone in the city's economy. Such a season draws visitors from far and wide.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: You're the Fisalias' eternal ally... and of course, my esteemed guest. No need for formalities between us.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Cantarella Fisalia.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I had the privilege of watching the Blessed Maiden's performance at the Carnevale once.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm rather surprised. After all this time, you still look exactly as you did that day.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But you and I should be around the same age.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You shouldn't have knowledge of this sword.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Lady Maiden...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I've waited for this moment, this chance to save the Sentinel... and my family.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I will not turn back, even if this does turn out to be a trap.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: If the thought of the final answer troubles you, then I suggest you step aside. {PlayerName} and I will take care of this matter.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Cantarella Fisalia—36th matriarch of the Fisalia family. I am pleased to make your acquaintance.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Honorable Laureate. The new Crown of the Carnevale.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Very well. If you insist, I see no reason to refuse.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You may also call me Cantarella.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Hmm... the Laurel is a gift of the Divinity. What claim have I to crown one as distinguished as yourself?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I should be the one to apologize for not understanding our guest's attempt at lightening the mood.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Very well. You may also call me Cantarella.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Now. Shall we proceed to my study?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Just as I expected... The Threnodian "took notice" of you the moment you learned the truth.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: {PlayerName}, what you see in this sanctuary is the Sentinel in Their true form.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: A majestic steed that galloped with the wind, not a creature of the ocean's depths.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Order worships a half-horse, half-sea creature Divinity, a form the Sentinel assumed only after being corrupted by the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Although the Sentinel's will has yet to fade, who knows how much longer They can endure.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: {PlayerName}. I wish to ask you to persuade the Sentinel of Jinzhou—Jué—to come to Rinascita. To save Imperator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: In return, I will agree to whatever condition or request you make.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Both Jinzhou and Jué owe you their future. That makes you the only person capable of this task.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I understand the position you are in. Word has it that you're currently staying at a hotel and are at odds with the Order.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Perhaps a stay at my estate would suit you, for the remainder of your time in Rinascita?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I can offer you a glimpse into Rinascita's past, and you'd be spared the Order's unwelcomed attention.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Care to elaborate?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The part regarding the maiden isn't entirely fiction.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Sentinel does indeed appoint a maiden to be Their Resonator, though not in the way the Carnevale would have you believe. No, it's through resonance with a very particular artifact.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That's because Imperator wields the power to split and manipulate space.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: With it, They can withdraw a portion of power. That power's frequency will match the Imperator's own.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This is how the Sword of Divinity—Tyrvine—came to be. A blade sealed with the very powers of the Sentinel, and the artifact used to select Their Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: To resonate with the sword is to resonate with the Sentinel. Only the chosen one may hope to draw it.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Martyred "Maiden"...? The nature of her resonance is unclear to me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Perhaps she resonated with the Threnodian, or perhaps with the Sentinel in its corrupted form.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But choosing her could not have been the Sentinel's will. That's because...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Maiden was already dead.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: In the past, each year the Fisalia family would hold the Divine Trials to select those with the strongest will. These young women would attempt to resonate with Tyrvine's powers—while Overclocked, of course.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Though none succeeded, some saw fragments of the truth hidden within the resonance.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I was one of them... There was a moment, where I glimpsed the Sentinel's corrupted form and the inverted ruin suspended in the sky.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I also learned that only Tyrvine can break the barrier of that Sonoro Sphere.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: When I awoke from that vision, I discovered a line of words inscribed onto my hand.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I would never mistake my own handwriting. That is precisely why I am searching for other possibilities.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The words were—"The Maiden is dead."
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: By all means.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: ...I suppose all that's left is its symbolic value.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: However, do handle it with care. It is a family heirloom... I've heard of your unique methods and formidable strength.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: {PlayerName}... Who are you really?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Sentinel's... Arbiter?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No... you're likely a far more special entity.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Please. Enlighten me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Sentinel of Jinzhou... If what our little Echo friend says is true, then the frequency that entered your Tacet Mark could be Imperator's powers.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It is reminiscent of the moment of Tyrvine's creation. Only this time the place of confinement has become your Tacet Mark.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Is that what you saw?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No. I only saw fragmented, blurry images...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: They seemed to belong to other places within the Sonoro Sphere.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I believe this is where we should rest. We'll wait until sunrise.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You're the one who needs rest most of all.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: After all, it's still only a possibility that the frequency you absorbed is the Sentinel's powers. Rest now, to ensure it doesn't take a toll on you.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I would never have imagined someone already considered a martyr could still be alive.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: What surprises me even more, is the connection you have with the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: We Fisalias revere Imperator as our one true Divinity. And yet here you stand, the Arbiter of the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Would it be more fitting to address you as "Master"?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Then, {PlayerName}. I present my request once more...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Are you willing to help rescue our Sentinel, and pull Rinascita back from the brink of chaos?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Tyrvine can only serve its purpose while in your hands. You should have it.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: We can discuss it on the way.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: A question that you already know the answer to. Why bother asking?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Although, being described as a "jellyfish"...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I imagine it's also a symbolic reminder that our beliefs have been turned on their head.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This view matches with what I saw at the time.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Won't you have a seat?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I hope you'll accept this tea as my way of apologizing for the incident with Gilberto.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Members of the family may have troubled you, but there is no stain that can't be washed away. Every sorrow has its own way of fading, don't you think?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You still hold a grudge. Won't you accept my apology?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I see. Let's set aside such past unpleasantness for the time being.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I invited you here to ask that you might serve as a mediator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I imagine it concerns... the Fisalia family's true beliefs?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It would seem Gilberto's mind is beyond saving.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But let's not dwell on that. What is your opinion on the current state of Ragunna, {PlayerName}?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So you've noticed something is amiss. As expected from someone who's felt the weight of a Threnodian invasion firsthand.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: And what exactly do you find most unsettling?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Because the Threnodian's invasion of Ragunna... has long since concluded.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Threnodian, so named Leviathan, possesses the power to merge and assimilate. It uses distorted beliefs to spread a spiritual plague that slowly devours civilizations from within.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Though the previous two attempts were thwarted, the tall mast of the galleon that is Ragunna has already been snapped in half.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Now the blissfully ignorant masses walk hand in hand toward an abyss they cannot see.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Friend or foe? As a newcomer to this land, can you really tell them apart?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Yes and no. On one hand, there's the truth of the Order's beliefs…
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: On the other, there's our family. The Threnodian doesn't take kindly to those who know the truth. We've always been under Its whispers.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Once the soul fractures, the mind will follow until only a puppet remains.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Now that we've come this far, there's nothing for me to hide.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: My only hope is that once you learn everything, you will carefully consider my request.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Not even whole, yet still ever so determined.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Phaom brought me here. I'd have shown myself earlier...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But it didn't seem like the right time to interrupt.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Looks like what I prepared could still be put to good use.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Sentinel's Sword. It will help you resist the Threnodian's attack.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: To pass the Divine Trials, every potential Maiden must resonate with the Sentinel through Tyrvine.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Those who survive receive fragments of truth, but at a cost. Memories lost in varying degrees.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The lost memories fall into this Sonoro Sphere, each carrying faint traces of the Sentinel's power. The power within those fragments of truth.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Tyrvine absorbs this energy.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Sentinel's energy flows through you. You are more than worthy of wielding this sword.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But you, Cartethyia... you alone must choose to wield it. Only then will it become the "Blessed Maiden's Sword."
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No... My sacrifice was used up long ago.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: At the time I resonated with the Sentinel, I saw..."you" through Their distorted eyes.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Or rather, I saw Fleurdelys battling the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: In that moment, I made a sacrifice that would shift the balance of power.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The energy I received from the Sentinel's Second Awakening.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I split it from myself and offered it back to the Sentinel so They could, for a moment, regain control of Their body.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Only by doing this could Fleurdelys seize the moment to kill the already tainted Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The real Blessed Maiden is dead.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But there is no reason why the "false" Blessed Maiden cannot herself become the "true" Blessed Maiden, is there?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: A person of true character should never be defined by an inanimate blade.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Both you and I were cursed to be mere playthings of the Threnodian, but that doesn't mean we cannot reshape our fate.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Had you not stopped the second Dark Tide... Well, it is we who should be thanking you.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Huh... at least you can't accuse me of ingratitude... I just need a moment's rest.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Apologies, but they're doing something rather important.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Please...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Do give them some privacy.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So, you haven't forgotten me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Hehe... I shouldn't put my guest on the spot. Moving on...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: How is Cartethyia?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Understandable. Her transition back to mortal life is a drastic departure from her former existence.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Now, I suppose I should thank you.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Bloodpact's Pledge. A symbol of the unbreakable pact between you and the Fisalia family.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Each head of the family is entitled to one and only one.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You vanquished the Threnodian and brought peace at last to the Fisalias. You should have it.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Consider this a token of gratitude.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You wish for more? Or is there something else you'd have me do?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You ask that I step down? Only a Fisalia by blood is eligible to head the family. But, I could make you a Fisalia consort.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: {Male=Is that a proposal?;Female=And also quite adaptable, I'm sure.}
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Sigh... you missed your chance.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Oh? {PlayerName}, do you intend to mediate between the two families?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Tiresome feuds rarely last between two formidable houses.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But alas, there is only so much light. Some branches greedily reach for more than they need, and the forgotten are doomed to wither in the dark.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Disagreements lie not only between families, but also within them.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: How fortunate, I now find myself with time to fix things.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: If you're interested, I'd gladly teach you how to "care" for a family such as ours.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Though, of course, I may change my mind at any moment.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So, you'd do well to visit often.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: ...Tell me, I'm ready.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: ...I'll remember that.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I've spent so long preparing for this day. A few more will hardly make a difference.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: More tea before you go?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This Gondola only has two seats...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It seems I get to enjoy a free ride after you've scouted the paths ahead.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Me?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Now's not the time to be so careless after that promise you just made to Cartethyia.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You should focus on learning more about this place from her. I'll be watching with great interest to see what you come up with.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: (Chuckle.)
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Well, then, the two of you go on ahead.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Greed will get you punished, you know.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The two of you can go on ahead.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This is the family "antidote," made to suppress Leviathan's spiritual corruption. Take it now.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: As long as we can identify the problem, there's a way to fight back. You carry the Sentinel's power within you. That's keeping the corruption at bay for now. What's left... are the hallucinations and whispers.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: I've learned about Leviathan's current state from Galbrena. The Fisalias have resisted the Threnodian for a century. Its whispers aren't undefeatable. We will defeat It.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Abby does... carry the Dark Tide's frequency...
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: I couldn't see the truth until the Threnodian's whispers finally quieted. Only then did those ancient records, once twisted beyond recognition, begin to make sense again.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Leviathan... was born from the shadows in our hearts. From our longing to connect and belong. It took the shape of a sea creature, because nothing frightens us more than the deep.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: It used faith to spread a spiritual plague. All the while, it has been feeding on our pains. Fear, despair, sorrow...
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Our ancestors believed Leviathan survived by absorbing these emotions. Little by little, it burrowed into Rinascita's collective unconscious.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: They said the Dark Tide is that subconscious made real, an ocean of shared trauma. That's why... they called Leviathan the "Master of the Deep."
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: If that's true... once the people's belief in the End Times reaches its zenith, their consciousness will align entirely with Leviathan's vision. Like Gilberto, and the others who were fully corrupted...
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: As long as I am the head of Fisalia, what happened here remains buried. No more trials, no more innocent lives caught in this web.
lines.quest_name: A Fleeting Night's Dream

lines.text: My freedom for theirs—a fair exchange, wouldn't you say?
lines.quest_name: A Fleeting Night's Dream

lines.text: It's time to leave, my dear.
lines.quest_name: A Fleeting Night's Dream
